path: Problem: Extract the Nth tokenized substring from a text field based on a delimiter and return it into adjacent columns
Action: SUBSTITUTE to expand delimiter into fixed-width blocks + MID with column-indexed start position + TRIM/LEFT/SUBSTITUTE to isolate the token
Observation: Replacing each delimiter occurrence with a long run of spaces creates predictable fixed-width segments; COLUMNS() provides the 1st/2nd/3rd… segment index when copying across
Problem: Remove a leading symbol from extracted tokens while leaving headers unchanged
Action: Use the delimiter itself as the split marker so extracted tokens exclude it; apply formula starting from the first data row only
Observation: If the split is performed on the symbol (e.g., '#'), the returned segment begins after the symbol, so no additional cleanup is required
Resolution: Start formula in [output_start_cell] on row [first_data_row] (not header row) and split on [symbol_delimiter] so returned tokens omit the symbol
